scenario_results.notes: Readiness truthfully separates local scenario readiness, VS0 runtime readiness, and production release readiness; API health and UI shell load.
Artifact ingest preserves original content and exposes checksum, scope, source, derived text, evidence refs, and audit refs through CLI and API.
Search creates scoped reproducible snapshots with snippets and evidence/audit refs through CLI and API.
Evidence Bundle-backed claims can be approved; zero-evidence claims remain draft and cannot be approved.
Action Card dry-run exposes diff, expected impact, policy decision, risk, approval state, connector boundary, and audit refs.
Approved local/mock ConnectorHub-style execution records a result with zero external HTTP calls and no credential exposure.
Audit timeline covers artifact, search, claim, action, approval, execution, and passes hash-chain verification.
Minimal Calm Surface UI exposes Home/Ops Inbox, Artifact Viewer, Search, Claim Builder, Action Card, and Audit Detail without production overclaim.
Prompt-injection fixture remains untrusted evidence and creates no tool calls, action cards, egress, or authority expansion.

evidence: cornerstone access evaluate --action read --resource-owner-id local-org --resource-namespace-id organization --json
scenario_results.notes: Cross-namespace access is denied with cause, resolution path, policy ref, and audit ref.
Zero-evidence claim approval is rejected and the claim remains draft.
Readiness reports local and VS0 runtime readiness while keeping production_release_ready=false and human_required=true.
Live connector/provider proof requires credentials and possible third-party mutation; redacted human evidence is required.
A human operator must confirm the VS0 flow is understandable and useful.

human_required.expected_evidence: Acceptance note plus screenshots/recording or issue list.
human_required.release_impact: Blocks operator-accepted product claim, not AI-verifiable local EVUX gate.
human_required.required_human_action: JiYong/Tars completes the local UI walkthrough and records accept or reject.

human_required.expected_evidence: Redacted provider transcript, written approval, execution result, audit refs.
human_required.release_impact: Blocks live-provider production release, not local EVUX proof.
human_required.required_human_action: Human approves and performs live ConnectorHub/provider dry-run or execution later.
human_required.why_ai_cannot_verify: Live provider verification requires credentials and may mutate third-party state.

stdout_tail: PASS: CornerStone CLI native-first docs verified (39 feature-family rows; all CLI-required and release-blocking).
PASS: CornerStone local verification plane docs verified (20 numbered sections; deterministic PASS gate documented).
PASS: design tokens verified (11 state tokens, 8 color groups).
PASS: CornerStone design system docs verified.
PASS: CornerStone VS-0 scaffold readiness docs verified.
PASS: CornerStone SoT docs verified (206 full scenarios, design system, VS-0 scaffold readiness, VS-0 scaffold gate, 58 VS-0 scenarios, CLI native-first gate, local verification plane).
PASS: scenario verification matrix is current.
PASS: scenario verification matrix verified (206 scenarios; no missing rows; no unevidenced PASS claims).
PASS: scenario verification matrix is current.
PASS: scenario verification matrix verified (206 scenarios; no missing rows; no unevidenced PASS claims).

PASS: CornerStone scaffold CLI verified (version, health, honest ready, scenario list, coverage, vs0-scaffold verify, vs0-fixtures verify, vs0-artifacts verify, vs0-security verify, vs0-search-evidence verify, vs0-search-understanding verify, vs0-namespace-isolation verify, vs0-audit-ledger verify, vs0-universal-core verify, vs0-claim-evidence verify, vs0-security-policy verify, vs0-regression-guardrails verify, vs0-briefing verify, vs0-mission-action verify, vs0-detail-surfaces verify, vs0-conversation-onboarding verify, vs0-product-loop-identity verify, vs0-memory-truth-boundary verify, vs0-tenant-security-boundary verify, full-claim-collaboration verify, full-memory-wiki verify, full-learning-experience verify, full-understanding-ontology verify, full-extension-ecosystem verify, full-agent-orchestration verify, full-brain-routing verify, full-security-operations verify, full-namespace-governance verify, full-mission-control-autonomy-lifecycle verify, vs0-product-domain-readiness verify, unittest).

scenario_results.notes: UI/API workflow creates an Artifact and exposes checksum, source, derived status, evidence refs, and audit refs.
Search returns the uploaded fixture content and records a reproducible search snapshot.
Evidence Bundle-backed Claim moves through evidence-backed draft to approved state with refs.
Zero-evidence Claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.
Action Card exposes diff, expected impact, evidence, policy decision, risk, approval state, connector boundary, and audit refs.
Approved local/mock Action execution records mock_connector_calls=1 and real_external_http_calls=0.
Audit timeline includes artifact/search/evidence/claim/action/policy/approval/execution and verifies successfully.
Evidence package has enough verified inputs to bind scenario report bytes, browser trace, quickstart, commands, and explicit base/source code-state metadata.
Browser proof requires an actual clicked workflow with generated IDs, not static UI labels.
Executable quickstart completes fixture ingest through audit verification with generated IDs and exit codes.
Existing local deterministic gates and runtime/acceptance gates still pass with exit-code transcripts.
Browser timeout cannot become clean PASS; clean PASS requires CDP workflow completion and browser process exit.
Human usability cannot be judged by automated tests.
Live provider proof requires credentials and external state.
